commands.teb: LOGURU_LEVEL=WARNING TF_CPP_MIN_LOG_LEVEL=2 uv run robot_sf_bench run --matrix configs/scenarios/sets/issue_1318_teb_corridor_deadlock_slice.yaml --algo teb --algo-config configs/algos/teb_commitment_camera_ready.yaml --benchmark-profile experimental --horizon 600 --out output/benchmarks/issue_1318_teb_corridor_deadlock_teb.jsonl --workers 1 --no-resume --no-video --structured-output json
commands.orca: LOGURU_LEVEL=WARNING TF_CPP_MIN_LOG_LEVEL=2 uv run robot_sf_bench run --matrix configs/scenarios/sets/issue_1318_teb_corridor_deadlock_slice.yaml --algo orca --benchmark-profile experimental --horizon 600 --out output/benchmarks/issue_1318_teb_corridor_deadlock_orca.jsonl --workers 1 --no-resume --no-video --structured-output json
commands.hybrid_rule_local_planner: LOGURU_LEVEL=WARNING TF_CPP_MIN_LOG_LEVEL=2 uv run robot_sf_bench run --matrix configs/scenarios/sets/issue_1318_teb_corridor_deadlock_slice.yaml --algo hybrid_rule_local_planner --algo-config configs/policy_search/candidates/hybrid_rule_v3_fast_progress_static_escape.yaml --benchmark-profile experimental --horizon 600 --out output/benchmarks/issue_1318_teb_corridor_deadlock_hybrid.jsonl --workers 1 --no-resume --no-video --structured-output json

interpretation.teb: The in-repo TEB adapter is runnable on the corridor slice but collides with static geometry on every selected seed.
interpretation.orca: ORCA is runnable and mixed on the same slice, with two route-complete successes and three pedestrian collisions.
interpretation.hybrid_rule_local_planner: The current hybrid-rule incumbent solves four of five selected seeds and remains the stronger local baseline for this slice.

metric_caveat: Map-runner floors collision metrics from exact environment or top-level collision flags when sampled wall/pedestrian metrics miss a flagged collision, preserving outcome/metric integrity without treating fallback as success.
